generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw the latest security breach reports. Our allies aren't holding up their end of the bargain. Remember the 2023 cyber attack? It happened because our partners didn't invest enough in joint defense. We can't afford to be the only ones taking security seriously. Time to demand real commitment from our allies or go it alone. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
